nodes.name: Caligavis
nodes.summary: Caligavis（Caligavis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如黃臉吸蜜鳥、Black-throated honeyeater、Obscure honeyeater。

nodes.name: Obscure honeyeater
nodes.summary: Obscure honeyeater（Caligavis obscura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Obscure honeyeater。

nodes.name: Obscure honeyeater
nodes.summary: The obscure honeyeater (Caligavis obscura) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. The obscure honeyeater was previously placed in the genus Lichenostomus but was moved to Caligavis after a molecular phylogenetic analysis published in 2011 showed that the original genus was polyphyletic. References
nodes.shortSummary: The obscure honeyeater (Caligavis obscura) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in New Guinea.
